hero_summary: Shawq Afza is a branch of the Ajam family, and its identity is determined through the upper treatment and the coloration produced by it within the Ajam framework.
short_identity: An Ajam branch with a distinctive upper color inside the family.

quick_facts.karar: The tonic according to the chosen root
quick_facts.ghammaz: Its importance varies according to the practical route
quick_facts.upper_jins: An upper region with a distinctive color
quick_facts.character: Bright, colored, and clear in the jawab
quick_facts.common_start: It begins by stabilizing the Ajam foundation, then opens the upper region

what_is_it: This branch is read inside the Ajam family as a maqam that preserves the essence of Ajam, but develops a special upper color that gives it its audible identity within the family.

lower.name: Jins Ajam
lower.description: The lower Ajam jins remains the basis that ties this branch to the family.

upper.name: An upper region with a distinctive color
upper.starts_on: After the tonic has been stabilized
upper.description: Its personality appears through the special coloring in the upper region.

jins_architecture.transition_note: The difference from Ajam appears in the upper color and in the way the jawab is built.

sayr.summary: It confirms the tonic first, then develops an upper route with a special color before returning to confirm its family belonging.
resting_tones: Resting points within the lower jins
Upper stations specific to this branch
motion_notes: The difference from Ajam is determined through the upper region
One should listen to how the jawab is opened and how the return from it is handled
common_path: Reveal the branch’s special upper color

transpose_explainer: When this branch is transposed to another root, the interval logic and the functions of the tones that give it its identity inside the Ajam family must be preserved.
historical_notes: This branch is understood through its relation to the parent maqam and through its difference from it in the upper region.
school_differences: Its explanation may differ according to school or reference.
common_confusions: Listing note names alone is not enough to understand this branch; one must pay attention to movement and repose.
listening_notes: Begin by comparing it with basic Ajam.
Notice where the special color appears in the upper region.
